cortex - Long-term memory for your AI agents.

Install: npm install -g @alaarab/cortex && cortex init

Key features:
- Automatic context injection into every prompt via lifecycle hooks
- 51 MCP tools for search, backlog management, finding capture, memory governance, entity graph, skills management, hooks management, bulk operations, data management, and session management
- Memory governance with confidence decay, trust filtering, and quality feedback
- Interactive terminal shell with eight views (Projects, Backlog, Findings, Review Queue, Skills, Hooks, Machines/Profiles, Health)
- Multi-agent support: Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Cursor, OpenAI Codex

Docs: https://alaarab.github.io/cortex/
Full LLM reference: https://alaarab.github.io/cortex/llms-full.txt
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@alaarab/cortex
